Subject: A young man
Theme: Grieving at a Loved One's Grave
Event: Standing alone beside a cold stone angel statue in the grey, overcast graveyard, the young man gently places a wilted rose on the grave, his heart heavy with the silent sorrow of loss.
story_prompts: The same A young man walks slowly through a quiet graveyard, head bowed amid scattered old tombstones under a pale blue sky with soft morning light.
The same A young man pauses thoughtfully, fingers clutching a wilted rose, standing before an ancient stone angel statue watching silently over aged graves shrouded in mist.
The same A young man kneels gently, placing the wilted rose on a weathered grave as the sky darkens, heavy grey clouds rolling in over the solemn cemetery.
The same A young man stands alone beside the cold stone angel statue, eyes fixed on the grave beneath a vast grey sky, embodying the deep sorrow of loss.
